item.name: Monetization
Brand - Orders

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description: Creates a Razorpay payment order for the pre-payment of a contract. If a valid order already exists (status: created/attempted), it reuses the existing order. Also sends a payment link email to brand members.

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description: Fetches the current payment order details and status from Razorpay for a given contract.

item.description: APIs for brands to manage payment orders on contracts.

item.name: Brand - Shipment

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description: Brand marks the product as shipped with tracking details. Notifies the influencer via push notification, email, and stream chat message. Sets contract status to 4 (Shipped).

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description:
Brand uploads proof of delivery (screenshot) and marks the shipment as delivered. Notifies influencer to confirm receipt. Sets contract status to 5 (Delivered).

**Required fields:**
- `screenshotUrl` (string) - URL of the delivery proof screenshot

**Optional fields:**
- `notes` (string) - Any notes about the delivery

item.description: APIs for brands to manage product shipment lifecycle.

item.name: Brand - Deliverables

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description: Brand requests the first video or a revision from the influencer. Notifies influencer via push notification, email, and stream chat. No request body required.

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description:
Brand approves the submitted deliverable (video) and selects a posting scenario.

**Required fields:**
- `postingScenario` (int) - The posting arrangement:
  - `1` = Influencer Will Post (scheduledDate required)
  - `2` = Influencer and Brand Collab Post (scheduledDate required)
  - `3` = Brand will use video independently (no scheduledDate needed)

**Conditionally required:**
- `scheduledDate` (int64, epoch ms) - Required for scenarios 1 & 2

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description:
Brand requests changes to the submitted deliverable. Increments the revision count and stores revision notes. Moves contract status back to 6 (Received) so influencer can rework.

**Required fields:**
- `notes` (string) - Feedback/instructions for the revision

item.description: APIs for brands to manage the content deliverable review cycle.

item.name: Brand - Posting

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description:
Brand schedules or reschedules the release date of the approved video. Notifies the influencer.

**Required fields:**
- `newScheduledDate` (int64, epoch ms) - The new posting date

item.description: APIs for brands to manage the posting schedule.

item.name: Influencer - Account

request.description:
Creates a Razorpay Route linked account for the influencer with KYC details (PAN, bank, address). If `reCreateAccount` is true, deletes the old Razorpay account and starts fresh.

**Required fields:**
- `name` (string) - Name as per PAN
- `pan` (string) - PAN card number
- `address` (object) - Current address with street, city, state, postal_code
- `bank` (object) - Bank details with account_number, ifsc, beneficiary_name

**Optional fields:**
- `reCreateAccount` (bool) - Set true to delete old account and re-create

Polls the current KYC/account verification status from Razorpay. Returns detailed account, stakeholder, and product information. Also self-heals by syncing Razorpay status back to Firestore if they diverge.

Updates the influencer's bank account details in both Razorpay and Firestore. Requires an existing Razorpay account.

**Required fields:**
- `account_number` (string)
- `ifsc` (string)
- `beneficiary_name` (string)

Updates the influencer's shipping/current address in both Razorpay (account + stakeholder) and Firestore. Requires existing Razorpay account and stakeholder.

**Required fields:**
- `street` (string)
- `city` (string)
- `state` (string)
- `postal_code` (string)

item.description: APIs for influencers to manage their Razorpay Route account, bank details, and address.

item.name: Influencer - Shipment

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description: Influencer requests the brand to ship the product. Notifies the brand via push notification, email, and stream chat. No request body required.

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description:
Influencer confirms they have received the product. Uploads a photo as proof. Notifies both brand and influencer. Sets contract status to 6 (Received).

**Required fields:**
- `photoUrl` (string) - URL of the received package photo

**Optional fields:**
- `notes` (string) - Any notes about the received package

item.description: APIs for influencers to manage the shipment receiving flow.

item.name: Influencer - Deliverables

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description:
Influencer submits the video deliverable (first draft or revision). Notifies the brand to review. Sets contract status to 7 (Deliverable Sent).

**Required fields:**
- `videoUrl` (string) - URL of the submitted video

**Optional fields:**
- `note` (string) - Any notes for the brand

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description: Influencer requests the brand to review and approve the submitted deliverable. (Placeholder endpoint - implementation pending)

item.description: APIs for influencers to submit and manage content deliverables.

item.name: Influencer - Posting

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description:
Influencer requests the brand to reschedule the posting date. Notifies the brand via push notification, email, and stream chat.

**Required fields:**
- `note` (string) - Reason for requesting the reschedule

variable.description: The contract ID for the collaboration

request.description:
Influencer marks the video as publicly posted. Provides proof screenshot and the live post URL. Brand has 2 days to review before payment release. Sets contract status to 9 (Posted).

**Required fields:**
- `proofScreenshot` (string) - Screenshot proving the post is live
- `postUrl` (string) - URL of the live post

**Optional fields:**
- `notes` (string) - Any notes about the posting

item.description: APIs for influencers to manage the posting phase of the collaboration.

item.name: Webhooks

header.description: HMAC SHA256 signature from Razorpay for webhook verification

request.description: Razorpay webhook endpoint for payment events. Listens for `order.paid` events to mark the collaboration as paid (contract status 3). Verifies webhook signature using `X-Razorpay-Signature` header. Notifies both brand and influencer.

header.description: HMAC SHA256 signature from Razorpay for webhook verification

request.description: Razorpay webhook endpoint for transfer events. Listens for `transfer.processed` events to mark the contract as settled (status 10) and close the collaboration. Notifies both brand and influencer that the workflow is complete.

item.description: Razorpay webhook endpoints for payment and transfer event processing. These are called by Razorpay, not by the app directly.
All monetization-related APIs for the Trendly platform — covering the full contract lifecycle from payment through posting and settlement.
